approved_claims.notes: Supported by accessible PMC full text.
approved_claims.text: In one retrieved multicenter pediatric RNS cohort, 35 patients were included and 34% were female (12 patients).

approved_claims.notes: This is a narrow evidence-gap claim limited to the retrieved sources and extracted text.
approved_claims.text: Among the retrieved pediatric RNS studies summarized here, sex-specific seizure outcomes or formal sex-difference analyses were not clearly reported in the accessible extracted text.

approved_claims.notes: Conservative synthesis reflecting the absence of reproducibly extracted sex-stratified outcome data.
approved_claims.text: The currently retrieved public evidence is sufficient to describe pediatric RNS cohort size and overall outcomes more confidently than to support claims about sex differences among pediatric RNS patients.
